refinement_recommendations.title: Implement Unified Verification Framework
refinement_recommendations.description: Create a standardized verification framework across all scheme files
refinement_recommendations.implementation: Extend entity_agent_modeling_v2_enhanced.scm patterns to all domains

refinement_recommendations.title: Ensure Complete Entity-Relation Mapping
refinement_recommendations.description: Every entity must have defined relations with confidence scores
refinement_recommendations.implementation: Audit all entity definitions and add missing relations

refinement_recommendations.title: Enhance Temporal Causation Chain Analysis
refinement_recommendations.description: Strengthen temporal analysis with precise timing and causation links

refinement_recommendations.title: Complete AD Element to Entity-Relation Mapping
refinement_recommendations.description: Map every AD paragraph to specific entities, relations, and legal principles
refinement_recommendations.implementation: Create AD-to-lex mapping scheme with priority classification

refinement_recommendations.title: Optimize Legal Principle Resolution Engine
refinement_recommendations.description: Enhance statutory basis identification and application
